web.title: AI-Powered Tools: Practice Tests, Study Guides, Flashcards & More
web.description: Quizlet offers an upgraded Learn mode, AI-generated practice tests, AI study guides and a PDF summarizer, an AI flashcard maker, and AI-powered homework help.
web.markdown:
# Explore our suite of AI tools

Quizlet’s AI-powered study tools help students learn faster, retain more, and study smarter. From generating practice tests to solving homework problems, our AI tools take the stress out of studying so students can focus on what matters most.

![Practice Test generator with question options and timer](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNgYep5xUNkB1LPG_Practice-test_600x400.png?auto=format,compress)

### AI-Generated Practice Tests

Turn notes into full-length practice exams with customizable question types, time limits, and difficulty for a realistic dress rehearsal.


[Generate a Practice Test](https://quizlet.com/ai-practice-test-generator) [Learn more](https://quizlet.com/features/ai-test-generator)

![Study Guide generated from uploaded notes and slides](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNlyEJ5xUNkB1MPL_BTS2024_Storyboard_AI-18.png?auto=format,compress)

### AI Study Guide    Generator

Upload notes, slides, or PDFs to instantly create structured outlines, flashcards, essay prompts, and related resources you can edit and personalize.


[Create a Study Guide](https://quizlet.com/study-guides/upload) [Learn more](https://quizlet.com/features/study-guides)

![PDF summarization producing concise study notes](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNlyDJ5xUNkB1MPJ_2StudyGuide%402x.png?auto=format,compress)

### AI PDF    Summarizer

Transform long PDFs, lecture slides, and handwritten notes into concise, organized study material with key ideas extracted automatically.


[Summarize a PDF](https://quizlet.com/study-guides/upload) [Learn more](https://quizlet.com/features/ai-pdf-summarizer)

![AI-created flashcards set with terms and definitions](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNHkJp5xUNkB0_2p_ImageforTextCallout%402x.png?auto=format,compress)

### AI Flashcard Maker

Turn your notes into custom flashcards in seconds. Edit, reorder, and expand sets to match your course and study style.


[Make Flashcards](https://quizlet.com/ai-flashcards/upload) [Learn more](https://quizlet.com/features/ai-flashcard-generator)

![Smart Assist generating flashcards from uploaded notes](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNquk55xUNkB1O7Z_SmartAssistStatic.png?auto=format,compress)

### Smart Assist

Skip the busywork. Upload notes or type a prompt and Smart Assist instantly builds quality flashcards, giving you more time to learn.


[Try Smart Assist](https://quizlet.com/create-set) [Learn more](https://quizlet.com/features/smart-assist)

![Expert Solutions with AI-powered tutoring](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aAvUJfIqRLdaBoY__expert-solutions.png?auto=format,compress)

### AI Homework Help

Go beyond step-by-step answers with AI-powered tutoring: alternate solution methods, deeper concept breakdowns, and personalized practice.


[Search Solutions](https://quizlet.com/explanations)

## AI Resources

### [How to write better essays using artificial intelligence](https://quizlet.com/content/how-to-write-essays-using-ai)

[![Profile Picture](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/NDcwNjJlODUtNGY1My00ODVlLTliOGUtZWMyZGNmNGU4ZjYz_cf352c59-81ea-4771-8950-931c2b325adc_publisher-quizlet.png?auto=compress,format&rect=0,0,361,361&w=361&h=361)\\
\\
Quizlet](https://quizlet.com/content/modern-learning-lab)

### [How to choose your major: 4 AI prompts to help you explore college majors](https://quizlet.com/content/how-to-choose-your-major)

[![Profile Picture](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/MWFmZDcyMDAtOWQxNy00ZjFiLTgwYWQtZjc2ZmM3NjY3OTlh_1ec8ca07-307a-4f09-a7c3-77a5f7a56b8e_publisher-quizlet.png?auto=compress,format&rect=0,0,180,180&w=180&h=180)\\
\\
Quizlet](https://quizlet.com/content/modern-learning-lab)

### [3 ways AI can help you land the job interview](https://quizlet.com/content/ways-ai-can-help-you-land-the-job-interview)

[![Profile Picture](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/MWFmZDcyMDAtOWQxNy00ZjFiLTgwYWQtZjc2ZmM3NjY3OTlh_1ec8ca07-307a-4f09-a7c3-77a5f7a56b8e_publisher-quizlet.png?auto=compress,format&rect=0,0,180,180&w=180&h=180)\\
\\
Quizlet](https://quizlet.com/content/modern-learning-lab)

### [4 ways you can use AI to organize your schoolwork](https://quizlet.com/content/ways-to-use-ai-to-organize-your-schoolwork)

[![Profile Picture](https://prismic-io.s3.amazonaws.com/quizlet-web/ae6af38a-49db-4d18-a837-ef7a7814e939_YjAzMTVmMzItZjY3ZC00YzY2LWI4ZTktMGQ3ODM4ZGMwMDQ1_1ec8ca07-307a-4f09-a7c3-77a5f7a56b8e_publisher-quizlet.avif?rect=0%2C0%2C180%2C180&w=180&h=180)\\
\\
Quizlet](https://quizlet.com/content/modern-learning-lab)

## FAQ

### What AI study tools does Quizlet offer?

Quizlet offers an upgraded Learn mode, AI-generated practice tests, AI study
guides and a PDF summarizer, an AI flashcard maker, and AI-powered homework help.


### Are Quizlet AI tools free to use?

You can start using Quizlet and some AI features for free. More advanced
capabilities are included with Quizlet Plus subscriptions, so students and
teachers can choose the level that fits their needs.


### Can teachers use Quizlet’s AI tools?

Yes. Teachers can use Quizlet’s AI tools to turn notes, slides, and readings
into practice tests, study guides, and flashcards, then share sets with classes
to save prep time and keep students practicing.


### How do Quizlet’s AI tools improve learning?

Quizlet’s AI tools focus on active recall and practice. They help students
generate questions, explanations, and personalized practice so they spend more
time engaging with the material instead of doing manual prep.


![Quizlet AI tools represented by icons around the Quizlet logo](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/aNlyE55xUNkB1MPO_BTS2024_Storyboard_AI-43.png?auto=format,compress)

web.description: Quizlet's interactive flashcards, practice tests, and study activities. Create your own flashcards or find sets made by teachers, students, and experts.
web.markdown:
# How do you want to study?

Master whatever you’re learning with Quizlet’s interactive flashcards, practice tests, and study activities.

Sign up for free

[I’m a teacher](https://quizlet.com/teachers)

## Every class, every test, one ultimate study app

Create your own flashcards or find sets made by teachers, students, and experts. Study them anytime, anywhere with our free app.

![](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/ZpWfEh5LeNNTxK_T_study-guides-image.png?auto=format,compress)

## Make class material instantly studiable

Turn your slides, videos, and notes into flashcard sets, practice tests, and study guides.

Try it out

![](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/ZpWfEx5LeNNTxK_U_learn-image.png?auto=format,compress)

## Test prep for any subject

Memorize anything with personalized practice tests and study sessions in Learn. 98% of students say Quizlet has improved their understanding.

Get started

![](https://images.prismic.io/quizlet-web/ZpFqjB5LeNNTxHvk_teacher-image-LOH.png?auto=format,compress)

#### TEACHERS

## Empower your students

Help every student confidently learn anything. With free flashcard sets, study modes, and in-class games like Quizlet Live, you can instantly create a more engaged classroom.

Sign up as a teacher

[See how teachers use Quizlet](https://quizlet.com/teachers)

## Frequently Asked Questions

We're on the hot seat.

Why is Knowt the best free Quizlet alternative?

5 million students & teachers have switched to Knowt and trust it for a good reason! It’s super easy to bring over your existing Quizlets to Knowt and start studying them completely free in seconds. You can go through unlimited rounds of our free learn mode, matching game, spaced repetition or practice test mode. Plus, if you want, you can also create your own flashcards or have AI [make Flashcards from your lecture videos](https://knowt.com/ai-video-summarizer), pdfs, notes, and more! If that's not for you, you can find millions of free flashcards made by other students at your fingertips. There’s a lot of great free study tools and resources to take advantage on Knowt that make it a great free quizlet alternative.

How can I make new flashcards on Knowt?

Option 1: Easily make AI Flashcards from your lecture videos and notes in seconds using ai. It's as easy as uploading your files and pressing a button!

Option 2: Find a flashcard set on Quizlet and bring it over to Knowt to take advantage of our free learn mode, free practice test mode and free games!

Option 3: Just add a term and definition to make your flashcards, plus add images to flashcards for free. You can also take advantage of our brand new AI Smart [Flashcard maker](https://knowt.com/ai-flashcard-maker) to save time!

What features are paid on Quizlet?

As of 2024, learn mode, practice tests, adding images & formatting to sets is paid on Quizlet. But, when you import those Quizlets onto Knowt, you can study them completely free without having to pay.

How do I use learn mode on Knowt?

Learn mode is a great way to master your flashcards, especially on a time crunch. To study your flashcards using learn mode, open your flashcard set and click on learn mode from the study modes on the left hand side. You can choose to turn on written mode or changes the question types of the flashcards using the Options button on th top right. All the customizability & options also makes this a great free quizlet alternative.

What makes Knowt better than Quizlet?

Knowt isn't just a Quizlet replacement—we’re an upgrade. While other alternatives to quizlet just stop at flashcards, our AI tools for students will create study guides, flashcards, notes, outlines, and much more for a fraction of the cost of any other site! For students looking for apps like Quizlet but free, you’ve found us: Knowt is a free study website like Quizlet that helps you study more efficiently by taking the notes and making flashcards for you, so you can get right to studying.  When compared to other study websites like Quizlet, it’s clear who’s the winner. Kai, your personalised AI study helper, can also answer any questions you have about notes, videos, PPTs, and even explain why you got a practice question wrong, making us the best AI study buddy.

Does Knowt replace traditional study methods?

Yes! Working as your very own study buddy AI, our AI studying tool creates personalized materials that help you understand the subject better and faster. You’ll never have to spend hours writing down flashcards again; at just a click of the button, you can upload your notes, slides, lecture videos and get a breakdown of everything you need to know within seconds. With our AI-generated study guides, smart flashcards, and adaptive learning, you’ll never think of using outdated study methods; your AI study assists optimize the learning process. Even study on the go with our [study app (available both on the App Store and Google Play)](https://knowt.com/mobile), so the best AI for study notes is available wherever you are. Your days of sitting at a desk staring at your notes are over, and you’ll never need to go back.

What types of files can Knowt take notes on?

Our AI study tools allow you to upload various types of files and get notes instantly. Whether you need to get notes on a 40 page PDF or word document, unreasonably long PowerPoints (PPTs), a 3 hour long lecture video, or even just lecture audio, our study guide creator will make a detailed breakdown of the file. Our AI study guide generator instantly extracts key information, summarizes content, and create study guides, flashcards. Within seconds, you’ll have study cards ready to use.

What are the different types of flashcard study modes on Knowt?

Knowt offers multiple flashcard study modes, giving students more flexibility than other free Quizlet alternatives. If you love Quizlet Learn Mode, you’ll be happy to know that Knowt has a free Learn Mode, letting you study your terms with multiple choice, true or false, fill in the blank, and flashcard options. In addition, you can study with spaced repetition mode, that helps you engrain your knowledge into your long term memory over studying it for a certain period of time, the matching game, quickly take a practice test generated from your notes to gauge how much you know, and simply traditional flashcards, now with sorting mode! Unlike other websites similar to Quizlet, Knowt doesn’t lock these features behind a paywall, making it the best Quizlet alternative with learn mode for all students.

What subjects do Knowt’s AI study tools work on?

Our AI study tools work for any subject, from math and science to history, literature, and foreign languages. No matter the study resource you want generated, we’ve got you covered. You can pick between an [AI PDF Summarizer](https://knowt.com/ai-pdf-summarizer), [AI Video Summarizer](https://knowt.com/ai-video-summarizer), [AI Note Taker](https://knowt.com/ai-lecture-note-taker), and [AI PPT Summarizer](https://knowt.com/ai-powerpoint-summarizer).

Can I use Knowt to study for AP exams?

Yes! Knowt is one of the best AI study tools for high schoolers preparing for AP exams. We even have an AP Hub that contains [AP notes and flashcards](https://knowt.com/exams/AP) from students that ACTUALLY took the exam , and realistic [AP practice tests](https://knowt.com/exams/AP/practice-test-room)& practice [FRQs for your AP exam](https://knowt.com/exams/AP/frq-room) to see your progress. If you need more study guides than are in our AP Hub, Our AI study guide generator can create structured outlines & helping you focus on test-specific content. Students can also use the AI study buddy to quiz themselves with practice tests, spaced repetition flashcards, and spaced repetition flashcards, and AI-powered explanations of difficult topics. Using our AP online study tools along with our AI study buddy, you’ll be getting that 5 in no time. We’ve also go study tools for other exams like our [IB revision notes on the IB Hub!](https://knowt.com/exams/IB)

What features are paid on Quizlet?

Quizlet used to be one of the most popular study tools, but many key features have now been locked behind a paywall. And let’s be honest, students can’t always afford to pay a subscription. That’s where we step in. If you’re looking for a Quizlet free alternative, Knowt is the best Quizlet replacement that gives you everything Quizlet Learn Free used to offer—at no cost. On Quizlet, the following features require a paid subscription:

- Quizlet Learn Alternative – Once free, now requires Quizlet Plus. Knowt provides a free version of Quizlet Learn with AI-powered flashcards and spaced repetition.
- Unlimited Practice Tests – Quizlet limits test mode access, but Knowt allows students to take as many AI-generated practice tests as they want.
- Custom Study Guides – Quizlet makes you pay for AI-powered study guides, but Knowt’s AI study guide generator creates structured guides for any subject, free for all students.

If you’re searching for apps like Quizlet but free, or simply study sites like Quizlet, look no further. Knowt is the ultimate solution.

Does Knowt replace traditional study methods?

Yes! Working as your very own study buddy AI, our AI studying tool creates personalized materials that help you understand the subject better and faster. You’ll never have to spend hours writing down flashcards again; at just a click of the button, you can upload your notes, slides, lecture videos and get a breakdown of everything you need to know within seconds. With our AI-generated study guides, smart flashcards, and adaptive learning, you’ll never think of using outdated study methods; your AI study assists optimize the learning process. Even study on the go with our study app (available both on the App Store and Google Play), so the best AI for study notes is available wherever you are. Your days of sitting at a desk staring at your notes are over, and you’ll never need to go back.

Is it Knowt or Knowit?

Our platform is called Knowt, but many people misspell it as Knowit. We've tried to change it, but it's too late. So, just remember, it's Knowt, not Knowit.
